validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-02'); matrix=json.loads((root/'P2_STAGE_ARTIFACT_MATRIX.json').read_text()); field=json.loads((root/'P2_ARTIFACT_FIELD_CONTRACTS.json').read_text()); schema=json.loads((root/'P2_SCHEMA_VALIDATOR_COVERAGE.json').read_text()); validation=json.loads((root/'P2_FIXTURE_VALIDATION_MATRIX.json').read_text()); deps=json.loads((root/'P2_STAGE_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.json').read_text()); impl=json.loads((root/'P2_IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CONTRACT.json').read_text()); artifacts=[a for s in matrix['stages'] for a in s['required_artifacts']]; assert matrix['artifact_count']==len(artifacts)==len(field['artifact_contracts']); assert matrix['stage_count']==len(matrix['stages'])==7; assert all(a.get('stage_id') and a.get('fixture_id')=='tiny_brief_intake' for a in artifacts); assert all(a.get('required_payload_fields') for a in artifacts); assert all(a.get('schema_ref') is not None or a.get('schema_absence_reason') for a in artifacts); assert schema['missing_refs']==[]; assert all(v.get('expected_evidence',{}).get('result_hash_required') for v in validation['validation_rows']); assert validation['validation_count']==len(validation['validation_rows']); assert deps['nodes']==[s['stage_id'] for s in matrix['stages']]; assert all(e.get('from_artifact_ids') and e.get('to_artifact_ids') and e.get('required_binding_artifact_ids') for e in deps['edges']); assert all(r.get('required_stage_ids') is not None and r.get('required_validation_ids') is not None and r.get('required_artifact_ids') for r in impl['implementation_inputs_after_lock']); print('PASS')"
validation_results.summary: artifact matrix, field contracts, schema coverage, validation matrix, dependency graph, and implementation handoff are structurally consistent

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-02'); scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text()); assert all(Path(p).is_file() for p in scope['actual_writes']); assert not scope['forbidden_write_violations']; assert all(p.startswith('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-02/') for p in scope['actual_writes']); print('PASS')"
